name: Lynx
desc: A Belobogian Snow Plains Explorer, and the youngest of the Landau siblings.\nCalm and collected, with a strong drive for action. Often embarks on solo adventures to explore the snowy wilderness.

1.name: Morning of Snow Hike
1.desc: When healing allies with HP percentage equal to or lower than <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, Lynx's Outgoing Healing increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. This effect also works on continuous healing.

2.name: Noon of Portable Furnace
2.desc: A target with "Survival Response" can resist <u>debuff</u> application for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s).

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

3.name: Afternoon of Avalanche Beacon
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Dusk of Warm Campfire
4.desc: When "Survival Response" is gained, increases the target's ATK by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak> of Lynx's Max HP for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

5.name: Night of Aurora Tea
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Dawn of Explorers' Chart
6.desc: Additionally boosts the Max HP increasing effect of "Survival Response" by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak> of Lynx's Max HP and increases Effect RES by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

111001.name: Ice Crampon Technique
111001.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of this character's Max HP to one designated enemy.
111001.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy.

111002.name: Salted Camping Cans
111002.desc: Applies "Survival Response" to a single target ally and increases their Max HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Lynx's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>. If the target ally is a character on the Path of Destruction or Preservation, the chance of them being attacked by enemies will greatly increase. "Survival Response" lasts for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nRestores the target's HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Lynx's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>.
111002.simple_desc: Applies "Survival Response" to a single ally, <color=#f29e38ff>increases their Max HP</color>, and restores their HP.

111003.name: Snowfield <unbreak>First Aid</unbreak>
111003.desc: Dispels <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <u>debuff(s)</u> from all allies and immediately restores their respective HP by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Lynx's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>.
111003.simple_desc: Dispels <color=#f29e38ff>1 <u>debuff</u> from all allies</color> and restores their HP.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

111004.name: Outdoor Survival Experience
111004.desc: When using Lynx's Skill or Ultimate, applies continuous healing to the target ally for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s), restoring the target ally's HP by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Lynx's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> at the start of each turn. If the target has "Survival Response," the continuous healing effect additionally restores HP by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Lynx's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>.
111004.simple_desc: When using Skill or Ultimate, applies <color=#f29e38ff>continuous healing</color> on the target ally. If the target has "Survival Response," the continuous healing effect additionally increases.

111006.name: Attack
111006.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

111007.name: Chocolate Energy Bar
111007.desc: After Lynx uses her Technique, at the start of the next battle, all allies are granted her Talent's continuous healing effect, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
111007.simple_desc: After this character uses her Technique, at the start of the next battle, all allies are granted a continuous healing effect.

1.point_desc: After a target with "Survival Response" is hit, Lynx regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy immediately.
Increases the chance to resist <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

1.point_desc: Extends the duration of the continuous healing effect granted by Talent for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
